steps.assistant_text: IDENTIFIED: __osSiRawStartDma (libreultra io/sirawdma.c verbatim; SI regs 0xA480 + PIF 0x1FC007C0 fingerprint). 7.1=5.3 identical at -O1. Retires the old 'factory/prep' decode. TRAP RELAYED: deleting the 1-word _pad.s GLOBAL_ASM leaves a 4-byte hole (asm-processor min-2-word dummy = 8 bytes in the object) — the genuine inter-fn alignment word must come back via SUFFIX_BYTES_FORCE=<fn>=0x00000000 (6EF08 precedent), plus a FORCED rebuild (Makefile-var changes don't dirty the .o).
